mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id AS categoryId, user_id AS userId, role, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM post_admin WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY role DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_admin (category_id, user_id, role, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
